description: This pipeline processes folder data by first converting provided paths into folder information, then creating annotations for each path based on its name or full path, and finally listing all subfolders, ultimately generating annotated folder structures from initial path inputs.

ab21e96c-8dc0-4b9e-9f9e-ad23b3ecbb59.name: import-folder-list
ab21e96c-8dc0-4b9e-9f9e-ad23b3ecbb59.description: Converts each provided path into folder data.

3a4b82b2-9543-4454-a8c5-9b484dfada4c.name: path-to-annotation-simple
3a4b82b2-9543-4454-a8c5-9b484dfada4c.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.
